creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Let me show you the current state of my xbuild test machine:

burner12# pwd
/usr/local/poudriere/ports/default

burner12# ls -1 *.patch
bad_sed_commands.patch
hal.patch
plasma.patch
pr223277_math_octave.patch
pr224209_devel_critcl.patch
pr224271_dtrace.patch
pr224372_games_oolite.patch
python27.patch
qt4-dbus.patch
qt45.patch
ruby.patch
strejda_graphics_opencolorio.patch
strejda_lang_go.patch
strejda_lang_ocaml.patch
strejda_mail_thunderbird.patch
strejda_math_py-numpy.patch
strejda_multimedia_libvpx.patch
strejda_science_avogadro.patch
strejda_sysutils_hal.patch
strejda_sysutils_p5-File-Stat-Bits.patch
strejda_www_firefox.patch
strejda_www_qt5-webengine.patch
strejda_www_qt5-webkit.patch
webkit.patch

So you can set that after a while having all those patches based at the same level is very helpful :-)
